title: DeepSeek Panic, US vs China, OpenAI $40B?, and Doge Delivers with Travis Kalanick and David Sacks
description:
(0:00) The Besties intro Travis Kalanick!

(2:11) Travis breaks down the future of food and the state of CloudKitchens

(13:34) Sacks breaks in!

(15:38) DeepSeek panic: What's real, training innovation, China, impact on markets and the AI industry

(50:14) US vs China in AI, the Singapore backdoor

(1:01:51) OpenAI reportedly in talks to raise ~$40B with Masa as the lead investor

(1:10:37) DOGE's first 10 days

(1:25:13) Future of Self Driving: Uber, Waymo, Tesla

(1:38:04) Fed holds rates steady, how DOGE can impact rate cuts

(1:44:17) Fatal DC plane crash

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the latest developments in AI, including DeepSeek's new model and its potential impact on the industry. They also talk about the US vs China in AI, OpenAI's potential $40B raise, and the future of self-driving cars. Guest Travis Kalanick shares his insights on the future of food and CloudKitchens.

takeaways.text: DeepSeek's AI model is a significant development in the industry
US and China are competing in AI development
OpenAI may raise $40B at a $340B valuation
Self-driving cars are still in development
CloudKitchens is changing the food industry
Fed holds rates steady, DOGE may impact rate cuts

quotes.text: Food is the next big thing
quotes.speaker: Travis Kalanick

sentiment.notes: The hosts are excited about the potential of AI and its impact on various industries. However, they also discuss the challenges and uncertainties surrounding these developments.

notable_moments.description: Discussion on US vs China in AI
